description: verifier_role.run_verification is a stub - asynchronous outsource-last pathway non-functional, work enqueued but never performed.
resolution: Implemented production run_verification using pick-cheapest-eligible-verifier-on-this-provider, build_verification_prompt, providers.call_model, parse_verification_response. Implemented production default handlers in orchestrator_role.py (acknowledged-and-completed pattern). Added 6 mocked-call_model unit tests (TestRunVerificationVerified, TestRunVerificationIssues, TestRunVerificationErrors). Updated 2 prior tests that asserted stubs raise NotImplementedError.
